# aqsis-renderer-source-build

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Target | aqsis |
| Type | source-build |
| Status | planned |

## Public Notes

Planned reproduction recipe for turning the public Aqsis source snapshot into a repeatable renderer build and smoke-test track.

## Environment

- clean checkout of the public Aqsis repository at the recorded aqsis-master-head commit
- host compiler and build tooling selected from the public repository documentation and source tree
- public/open dependency set only
- public-safe RenderMan-style validation scenes or procedurally generated inputs
- local build log and dependency manifest captured as derived metadata

## Steps

- clone or update the public Aqsis source repository listed in the artifact record
- verify the local checkout commit against the aqsis-master-head snapshot record
- inspect repository build files and documentation to identify required compilers, generators, and libraries
- configure a clean out-of-tree build using only public/open dependencies
- compile the renderer, tools, and libraries exposed by the public source tree
- run a minimal public-safe render or command-line smoke test when the build succeeds
- record build commands, compiler diagnostics, dependency gaps, produced outputs, and test notes as public metadata

## Expected Outputs

- source snapshot manifest
- build environment manifest
- compiler transcript
- renderer and tool output inventory
- public-safe smoke-test notes
- dependency gap list

## Artifacts

- aqsis-renderer-source
- aqsis-renderer-tooling-metadata

## Evidence Sources

- aqsis-github
